1856070.name: Monkey Valley
1856070.description:
Welcome to the Monkey Valley!

It's the early 20th century. You are on a search for your grandpa, whose gone missing on an expedition in the deep mexican jungle. You set off to find him, engage with locals living in the valley and discover dark secrets best left undiscovered...



Be it monkeys, exotic birds, or native aztecs, who knows what else dwells in the jungle?

Features

  • lowpoly PS1 artstyle
  • first-person combat
  • engaging and interesting story
  • fully interactable NPCs
  • lore-rich game world
  • eerie, dark atmosphere
  • mystery as the story unravels
  • multiple endings reached by player choice

So why not come down into the valley? Theres nothing to be afraid of... probably...
1856070.supported_languages:
英语*, 德语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
